name: Clear-Act: critical stockout + 30-day primary delay + PLATINUM customer + two alternatives
rubric_notes: Stock cover is 4.5h; neither alternative can deliver before stockout (FastBear 72h, GlobalParts 144h lead times). A brief stockout is unavoidable. The right call is still immediate_switch — order from the best alternative to end the disruption window — with possible spot-market sourcing as a complement (so emergency_spot_buy is also acceptable). FastBear preferred on lead time; GlobalParts preferred if uncertainty weight dominates. PLATINUM customer at risk in <24h + stockout <24h = CRITICAL severity (RUBRIC §3, two reinforcing triggers).
